L1_headline: + SEM – Thomas P Mullin disposed shares for tax withholding. | 08/01/25
L2_brief: Thomas P Mullin, Co-President of Select Medical Holdings, surrendered 22,045 shares at $12.57 per share on 08/01/25 to satisfy tax withholding obligations upon vesting of restricted stock. This is a routine, non-discretionary transaction related to equity compensation and does not signal a change in insider sentiment.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: Tax withholding surrender upon restricted stock vesting — this is an automatic, routine transaction tied to compensation, not a discretionary sale. Insider retains substantial holdings of 391,709 shares post-transaction.
risks_flagged: Transaction code F indicates mandatory tax withholding surrender, not a discretionary sale
Shares surrendered represent approximately 5.3% of post-transaction holdings — modest relative to total position
